functions.label: controlHasVariableName
description: Type guard to check if a control state object has a variable name property.

returnComment: True if the control state has a defined variableName property

enums.label: EsqlControlType
description:
Types of ES|QL controls
- STATIC_VALUES: Static values that are not dependent on any query
- VALUES_FROM_QUERY: Values that are dependent on an ES|QL query

misc.label: ESQL_CLASSIC_SOLUTION_ID
description:
Identifier for the classic (non-solution) view.
Items registered under this ID are visible in all views, regardless of the active solution.

misc.label: ESQLRegistrySolutionId
description:
Extended solution ID type used by the extensions registry.
Includes the standard Kibana solution project types plus 'classic'
for items that should be available outside of (and across) all solutions.
